atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right ankle pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes the pain as a constant throbbing pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports warmth associated with the pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain is exacerbated by touch

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has previously sprained this ankle

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has taken ibuprofen and ice for the pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies numbness or tingling in his foot

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports ecchymosis on the lateral ankle

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The x-ray revealed no fractures or bony abnormalities

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Capillary refill was less than 3 seconds in the right foot

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has a right ankle sprain

atomic_propositions.speaker: provider
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The provider instructed the patient to keep his leg elevated

atomic_propositions.speaker: provider
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The provider advised the patient to ice it five times a day for 20 minutes

atomic_propositions.speaker: provider
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The provider recommended an air cast to stabilize the ankle
